errors.SLOT_TAKEN: That time was just taken. Please pick another slot.

errors.OTP_EXPIRED: That code has expired. Request a new one.
errors.OTP_ATTEMPTS_EXCEEDED: Too many incorrect attempts. Request a new code.

errors.FORBIDDEN: You don’t have access to that.
errors.NOT_FOUND: We couldn’t find what you were looking for.
errors.VALIDATION: Some details are invalid. Please check and try again.
errors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.INTERNAL: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again.
